2606.30949.title: AgRefactor: Self-Evolving Agentic Workflow for HLS Compatibility and Performance
2606.30949.paper_summary: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) provides a fast path from concepts to silicon, but converting real-world software into synthesizable HLS code remains challenging due to restrictive language support and the gap between software and hardware programming practices. Existing automated and LLM-based refactoring approaches partially address this problem, yet they often lack flexibility, struggle to scale, and incur high computational costs. We introduce AgRefactor, an LLM-based multi-agent workflow for refactoring software into HLS-compatible programs. AgRefactor incorporates a self-evolving memory system that accumulates and retrieves factual and strategic knowledge across tasks, improving robustness and efficiency on unseen programs. To reduce cost and enhance scalability, it integrates automated refactoring tools, enabling agents to balance LLM-driven rewrites with efficient tool-based transformations. On 9 out of 11 challenging real-world benchmarks, which are 5-10x longer than the most complex cases studied in prior work, AgRefactor outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art automated refactoring tool and a strong LLM-based baseline built on the same framework backbone. Further agentic performance optimization yields a 6.51x geometric mean speedup over the SoTA pragma tuning tool and a 1.20x speedup over optimized open-source designs with less than 20% extra resources. AgRefactor is fully-automated and open-sourced.
2606.30949.paper_summary_zh: 高階合成（HLS）提供了從概念到矽的快速路徑，但將現實世界的軟體轉換為可合成的 HLS 代碼仍然具有挑戰性，這主要是由於語言支持的限制以及軟體與硬體編程實踐之間的差距。現有的自動化和基於 LLM 的重構方法部分解決了這個問題，但它們往往缺乏靈活性，難以擴展，並且產生高計算成本。我們介紹了 AgRefactor，一種基於 LLM 的多代理工作流程，用於將軟體重構為 HLS 兼容的程序。AgRefactor 包含一個自我演化的記憶系統，能夠在任務之間積累和檢索事實和策略知識，提高對未見程序的穩健性和效率。為了降低成本並增強可擴展性，它集成了自動重構工具，使代理能夠平衡基於 LLM 的重寫和高效的工具基於轉換。在 11 個具有挑戰性的現實世界基準中，有 9 個的複雜度是先前研究中最複雜案例的 5-10 倍，AgRefactor 的表現超過或匹配了最先進的自動重構工具以及基於相同框架的強大 LLM 基線。進一步的代理性能優化使其在 SoTA pragma 調整工具上實現了 6.51 倍的幾何均值加速，並在優化的開源設計上實現了 1.20 倍的加速，所需額外資源少於 20%。AgRefactor 是完全自動化且開源的。
2606.30949.author: Yang Zou et.al.
2606.30949.authors: Yang Zou, Zijian Ding, Yizhou Sun, Jason Cong
